title: Create Style Wooden Hopper
description:
Create style texture for thecech12's "Wooden Hopper".

Requires woodenhopper, createmod(0.5.1 or higher version).
body:
Create style texture for thecech12's "Wooden Hopper". Requires woodenhopper, createmod(0.5.1 or higher version).

This mod was inspired by moromorochan's "Create Style Hopper" mod, and they also gave me some advice & support on how to go about creating this project. So please if possible send them some love on their project.

All credit to the original creators of both projects.

If any of the original authors have questions or comments reach out to me anytime here or on discord @ vhaultyr

Leave any suggestions or issues in the comments for now 😊 If there is a demand I will make a GitHub repository for this project to update it or make changes.

 

Screenshot Details:

Structure is made of Andesite Casings from the Create Mod
Chest textures are from Quark
Shader used was Complementary Reimagined 5.4 ^-^
